summary: Comprehensive regression testing completed after backend restoration. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tested for Admin portal, Pharmacy portal, and Driver portal - all working correctly. Multi-role authentication, order management with full status flow, route management, QR code scanning, and POD features all verified functional.

backend: GET /api/health - Health check passed (database connected, circuit configured)
GET /api/admin/dashboard - Admin dashboard accessible with stats
GET /api/circuit/status - Circuit status: connected with 4 drivers
POST /api/orders/ - Pharmacy can create orders with copay
Order status flow: new → picked_up → in_transit → out_for_delivery → delivered (all transitions work)
GET /api/admin/orders?limit=10 - Bulk order retrieval for bulk operations
frontend: Homepage landing page loads correctly
Admin login via Pharmacy Portal link successful
Admin Dashboard shows: 13 Total Users, 2 Active Pharmacies, 3 Active Drivers
Admin Dashboard shows: 4 New Orders, 0 Out for Delivery, 0 In Transit, 2 Delivered Today
Admin Dashboard shows Copay Collection section
Admin Orders page - Categories view works (12 New, 3 Picked Up, 0 In Transit, 5 Out for Delivery)
Admin Orders page - List view works with order table
Admin Orders page - Smart Organizer view works with borough organization (Q, B, M, S, X)
Admin Orders page - Drag & Drop enabled for reassigning orders
Admin Orders page - Inline status select works on order cards
Admin Orders page - Status filter dropdown works
Admin Orders page - Search input works
Admin Routes page - Shows 5 Active Plans, 4 Available Drivers
Admin Routes page - Create Route Plan modal works with date picker and driver selection
Pharmacy Portal - Login successful
Pharmacy Portal - Shows 20 Active orders, 2 Completed
Pharmacy Portal - Create Delivery modal works with time window selection
Pharmacy Portal - Copay to Collect input field present
Pharmacy Portal - Refrigerated Fee add-on available
Driver Portal - Login successful as 'Mike Driver'
Driver Portal - Shows 5 Active Deliveries, 2 Total Completed
Driver Portal - Status buttons work (Available, On Break, Offline)
Driver Portal - Delivery cards show order info with Pickup/Deliver scan buttons
Driver Portal - Delivery Details modal shows pickup/delivery info
Driver Portal - Complete Delivery (POD) button opens POD modal
Driver Portal - POD modal shows signature pad, photo capture, and notes
Driver Portal - 'Signature Required' badge visible for signature-required packages

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs functioning correctly after backend restoration
Multi-role authentication working: Admin, Pharmacy, Driver
Order status flow complete: new → picked_up → in_transit → out_for_delivery → delivered
QR code scanning with borough prefix (Q/B/M/S/X) working
POD (Proof of Delivery) with signature and photo capture working
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with prefixes TEST_Order_Patient, TEST_NoCopay_Patient, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete regression testing done. All features working: Admin dashboard, Orders management (Categories/List/Smart Organizer views with drag-drop), Route management (Circuit integration), Pharmacy portal (order creation with copay), Driver portal (deliveries, status updates, QR scanning, POD submission). Status flow: new → picked_up → in_transit → out_for_delivery → delivered all tested.

features_tested.admin_dashboard: WORKING - shows stats, orders, copay collection
features_tested.admin_orders_view: WORKING - Categories, List, Smart Organizer views
features_tested.pharmacy_order_creation: WORKING - with copay, time windows, refrigeration
features_tested.driver_pod_submission: WORKING - signature pad and photo capture
features_tested.order_status_flow: WORKING - new → picked_up → in_transit → out_for_delivery → delivered
